analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet claims Democrats abandoned previously 'smart' immigration policies that protected American workers, and contrasts this with President Trump prioritizing hard-working Americans. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not promoted; no reference to American historical values or legacy beyond a partisan policy claim. US2 (admirable society) – Not promoted; no celebration of societal groups or civil society. US3 (hostile enemies) – Not applicable; Democrats are criticized as a political opponent, not framed as immoral external enemies threatening the US. US4 (force for good) – Not promoted; no mention of human rights/peace/global good. US5 (great international ally) – Not relevant; no discussion of allies. US6 (at the forefront) – Not promoted; no claim of US leadership in domains. Conclusion: The tweet does not align with any listed narratives.
